Heading: CRFT Menu For CRFT TTL
Query:
Insert into AML_INTERNAL.TBL_CRFT_ROLE_DTL
  (ROLE_DT_ID, ROLE_ID, EMPCODE, STATUS_ID)
  (select SEQ_CRF_ROLE_DT_ID.NEXTVAL, t.menu_id, 338019, 1
     from AML_INTERNAL.TBL_CRFT_SUB_MENU_MST t
    where t.menu_id in (6,10)
      and t.menu_id not in (select t.role_id
                              from AML_INTERNAL.TBL_CRFT_ROLE_DTL T
                             where t.empcode = 338019)); --- For Add menu to Testing Tech Leads
